rejection_reason: Estimated ~17.8M params exceeds 15.3M param limit (16MB artifact constraint). mlp_mult=3 with model_dim=512 and 8 layers produces ~17.3M layer params + 524K embedding. Safe combos require mlp_mult<=2 at dim=512.
notes: Config rejected pre-training. CLAUDE.md safe combos: (8, 512-576 with mlp_mult<=2). This config uses mlp_mult=3.
